prompt: Using the attached photo as the reference, create a nighttime urban photographic portrait of a young woman with an alternative, grunge aesthetic. She has straight shoulder-length hair parted down the middle, light-colored eyes with bold black cat-eye eyeliner, long eyelashes, a nose ring, and glossy slightly parted lips with the tip of her tongue subtly visible. She is wearing an oversized dark gray darkwear hoodie with the hood up, a textured garment underneath, large black over-ear headphones resting on top of the hood, and a black crossbody canvas bag. She is leaning in a narrow urban alley at night, surrounded by graffiti-covered metal shutters and worn, weathered walls. The scene is illuminated by a strong direct flash, creating the look of a compact digital camera with harsh shadows, high contrast, cool greenish-cyan color grading, and a dark atmosphere with fluorescent lighting. Slightly low-angle wide-angle perspective, medium shot, centered composition, moderate depth of field, highly detailed textures, hyper-realistic photography, urban fashion editorial style, underground aesthetic, melancholic cinematic mood, ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, razor-sharp focus.
